sentences.target: Von meinem Standpunkt aus sehe ich das anders.
sentences.reading: /fɔn ˈmaɪ̯nəm ˈʃtantpʊŋkt aʊ̯s ˈzeːə ɪç das ˈandɐs/

translations.de: Von meinem Standpunkt aus sehe ich das anders.
translations.ipa: /fɔn ˈmaɪ̯nəm ˈʃtantpʊŋkt aʊ̯s ˈzeːə ɪç das ˈandɐs/
translations.en: From my standpoint, I see it differently.
translations.es: Desde mi perspectiva, lo veo de otra manera.
translations.fr: De mon point de vue, je le vois autrement.
translations.it: Dal mio punto di vista, la vedo diversamente.
translations.zh-Hans: 在我看来，我的看法不同。
translations.yue: 喺我角度嚟睇，我有唔同嘅睇法。
translations.ru: С моей точки зрения, я вижу это по-другому.
translations.pt: Do meu ponto de vista, vejo isso de outra forma.
translations.he: מנקודת המבט שלי אני רואה את זה אחרת.
translations.vi: Từ góc nhìn của tôi, tôi thấy điều đó khác.
translations.ar: من وجهة نظري، أراه بشكل مختلف.
translations.nl: Vanuit mijn perspectief zie ik het anders.
translations.uk: З моєї точки зору, я бачу це інакше.
translations.hi: मेरे नजरिए से, यह मुझे अलग लगता है.
translations.pl: Z mojego punktu widzenia widzę to inaczej.
translations.el: Από τη δική μου σκοπιά, το βλέπω αλλιώς.
translations.nb: Fra mitt ståsted ser jeg det annerledes.
translations.id: Dari sudut pandang saya, saya melihatnya berbeda.
translations.sv: Ur mitt perspektiv ser jag det annorlunda.
translations.ro: Din perspectiva mea, o văd altfel.
translations.cs: Ze svého pohledu to vidím jinak.
translations.da: Fra mit perspektiv ser jeg det anderledes.
translations.ja: 私の立場からは、違って見えます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition starting the prepositional phrase; together with 'aus' forms the fixed frame 'von ... aus' meaning 'from (the perspective of) ...'.
Possessive determiner in dative singular, modifying 'Standpunkt' inside the PP.
Noun, head of the PP; object of 'von' (dative singular masculine).
Preposition completing the frame 'von ... aus'; functions as a postpositional particle closing the PP.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present), head of the clause.
Personal pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Demonstrative/neutral pronoun functioning as the direct object (accusative).
Adverb of manner modifying 'sehe'.

translations.es: Ella se mantiene en su postura.
translations.it: Lei rimane ferma sulla sua posizione.
translations.vi: Cô ấy giữ vững lập trường của mình.
translations.nl: Ze houdt vast aan haar standpunt.
translations.hu: Ő kitart a saját álláspontja mellett.
translations.hi: वह अपनी बात पर कायम रहती है.
translations.nb: Hun holder fast ved sitt standpunkt.
translations.sv: Hon står fast vid sin ståndpunkt.
translations.ro: Ea rămâne fermă pe poziția ei.
translations.da: Hun holder fast i sit standpunkt.
translations.ja: 彼女は自分の意見を曲げません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person singular); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present), intransitive; meaning 'remains'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the PP expressing adherence.
Possessive determiner in dative singular, modifying 'Standpunkt' within the PP.
Noun, head of the PP; object of 'bei' (dative singular masculine).

translations.en: We find your point of view understandable.
translations.es: Nos parece comprensible tu punto de vista.
translations.fr: Nous trouvons ton point de vue compréhensible.
translations.it: Troviamo comprensibile il tuo punto di vista.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们觉得你的观点可以理解。
translations.yue: 我哋覺得你嘅睇法係可以理解嘅。
translations.ru: Мы считаем, что твою позицию можно понять.
translations.pt: Achamos compreensível o seu ponto de vista.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy quan điểm của bạn dễ hiểu.
translations.hi: हमें तुम्हारा नजरिया समझ में आता है.
translations.pl: Uważamy, że twój punkt widzenia jest zrozumiały.
translations.nb: Vi synes synspunktet ditt er forståelig.
translations.id: Kami merasa sudut pandangmu mudah dipahami.
translations.sv: Vi tycker rằng din ståndpunkt är förståelig.
translations.ro: Considerăm că punctul tău de vedere e de înțeles.
translations.da: Vi synes, at dit synspunkt er forståeligt.
translations.ja: あなたの考え方は理解できると思います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person plural, present), transitive.
Possessive determiner in accusative singular masculine, modifying 'Standpunkt' as the object.
Noun, direct object of 'finden' (accusative singular masculine).
Predicative adjective functioning as an object complement with 'finden' (object predicative).

sentences.target: Der Standpunkt des Chefs ist klar.

translations.de: Der Standpunkt des Chefs ist klar.
translations.es: La postura del jefe está clara.
translations.fr: La position du patron est claire.
translations.it: La posizione del capo è chiara.
translations.pt: A posição do chefe é clara.
translations.vi: Lập trường của sếp rất rõ ràng.
translations.nl: Het standpunt van de baas is duidelijk.
translations.el: Η θέση του αφεντικού είναι ξεκάθαρη.
translations.ja: 上司の立場ははっきりしています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; introduces the subject noun.
Noun, head of the subject NP (nominative singular masculine).
Genitive article marking the dependent possessor.
Noun in genitive singular; genitive modifier (possessor) of 'Standpunkt'.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate.
Predicative adjective; subject complement after the copula.

We find your point of view understandable.
